# anaken-one-landing

## Manifest

- Try; Iterate; Learn
- If an error occurs, note the fix and workflow, and ensure the same thing doesn't occur again

## Git / PR Workflow

- Main branch: `main`
- Feature branches: `claude/<slug>` (e.g. `claude/add-dark-mode`)
- Branch to feature branch before starting coding; never commit to `main` directly
- Run tests/lint before every commit
- Keep commits small — one concern per commit
- Write commit messages that describe *why*, not just *what*
- `gh` CLI may not be installed; use web URL for PRs:
  `https://github.com/{{org}}/{{repo}}/compare/<branch>`

## Safety Rules

### Never Touch
- Never read, print, log, or include in output: `.env`, `.env.*`, `*.key`, `*.pem`, `secrets/`, `credentials/`
- Never commit files matching: `.env*`, `*secret*`, `*credential*`, `*.pem`, `*.key`
- Never run `git push --force` without explicit confirmation
- Never run `DROP`, `DELETE`, or `TRUNCATE` on production databases
- Never delete files outside the project root

### Before Destructive Actions
- Always confirm before: deleting files, dropping tables, force-pushing, clearing caches
- If unsure whether an action is reversible, STOP and ask

### After Building
- Run full test suites (unit / integration / regression tests / simulation)

### Git Hygiene
- Always check `git status` before committing
- Never stage `.env` or secret files — verify with `git diff --cached` first
- Use feature branches; never commit directly to `main`

## Stack: Next.js

- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router) + React
- **Rendering:** Server Components by default. `"use client"` only for interactivity
- **Styling:** Hand-rolled CSS with custom properties — no Tailwind, shadcn, or MUI
- **State:** `useState` / `useContext` only — no external state managers
- **API routes:** Thin handlers — business logic goes in `/lib/`
- **Deployment:** Vercel — auto-detects Next.js, auto-deploys on push to `main`
- Semantic HTML. Mobile-first. Min viewport: 375px
- No hardcoded hex in components — use CSS variables

## Design Reference

**Primary:** [https://family.co](https://family.co) — clone this aesthetic.
**Secondary:** [https://rauno.me](https://rauno.me) (scroll/motion), [https://21st.dev/Northstrix/circular-testimonials/default](https://21st.dev/Northstrix/circular-testimonials/default) (carousel)

## Tokens

```
Font:     Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
bg:       #ffffff  /  bg-alt: #fbfaf9
text:     #494440  /  heading: #343433  /  muted: #848281
border:   #f2f0ed  /  border-mid: #eaeaea
btn-dark: #171717  /  btn-sec: #f6f4ef  /  hover: #eae6dd
accent:   #3784F4 (links)  green: #34C759  orange: #FF5310
radius:   12px cards  /  32px pill buttons
shadow:   inset 0 0 0 1px #f2f0ed  /  lift: 0 3px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.08)
ease:     cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1) 220ms  /  fast: 100ms ease
```

## Aesthetic Guardrails

1. No terminal/retro — no monospace body font, no grid bg, no glitch, no corner accents.
2. Light mode is primary (`#fbfaf9` beige default). Dark mode is a future option.
3. Inter only. No custom font loading beyond Inter.
4. Single accent per context. Don't introduce new colors without reason.
5. Rounded everything — 12px cards, 32px pill CTAs, 8px inputs.
6. No UI libraries (no Tailwind, shadcn, MUI). CSS custom properties + inline styles only.
7. Subtle motion only — fade-ups, hover lifts, opacity. No springs or scroll-jacking.
8. No stock photos. Typography and geometry only.

## Content

- Voice: first-person, direct, slightly dry. Not corporate.
- Projects listed only with a live URL.
- `/now` must reflect current reality or be removed.

## Routes

| Route | Notes |
|---|---|
| `/` | Hero · stats · projects · articles · CTA |
| `/articles` | Listing |
| `/articles/[slug]` | SSG · 6 articles · prev/next |
| `/projects` | Card grid + dot nav |
| `/lab` | Experiments with status badges |
| `/uses` | Stack & tools |
| `/now` | Current focus — keep updated |
| `/contact` | Form → nodemailer (set `.env.local`) |
| `/api/news` | 8h ISR + fallback |

**Out of scope:** auth, CMS, comments, e-commerce.
